title.en: Alibaba Releases Qwen3.5: Open-Source Multimodal Models Rivaling Sonnet 4.5
title.zh: 阿里巴巴发布 Qwen3.5：媲美 Sonnet 4.5 的开源多模态模型

summary.en: Alibaba released the Qwen3.5 series of open-source models under Apache 2.0, featuring Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture — the 35B model activates only 3B parameters per token and the 122B activates 10B, yet both deliver performance comparable to Claude Sonnet 4.5 on benchmarks like MMLU and MMMU-Pro. The flagship Qwen3.5-397B is a native vision-language model with early-fusion multimodal training and built-in reasoning for agentic applications. The MoE design makes enterprise-grade AI capabilities practical for local deployment without relying on API providers.
summary.zh: 阿里巴巴以 Apache 2.0 协议发布了 Qwen3.5 系列开源模型，采用混合专家（MoE）架构——35B 模型每个 token 仅激活 3B 参数、122B 仅激活 10B，却在 MMLU 和 MMMU-Pro 等基准上达到媲美 Claude Sonnet 4.5 的性能。旗舰版 Qwen3.5-397B 是原生视觉语言模型，采用早期融合多模态训练并内置推理能力，面向智能体应用。MoE 设计使得企业级 AI 能力无需依赖 API 服务商即可在本地实际部署。

title.en: Perplexity Launches "Computer": Multi-Model Agent Orchestration Platform
title.zh: Perplexity 推出「Computer」：多模型智能体编排平台

summary.en: Perplexity launched "Computer," a multi-model agent orchestration platform that coordinates 19 different AI models to complete complex, long-running workflows autonomously. The system breaks down outcomes into tasks and subtasks, with specialized sub-agents handling web research, document generation, data processing, and API calls. Available to Perplexity Max subscribers at $200/month, it reflects a growing thesis that AI models are specializing rather than converging, and the winning platform will orchestrate them together.
summary.zh: Perplexity 推出了「Computer」，一个协调 19 种 AI 模型的多模型智能体编排平台，能够自主完成复杂的长时间工作流。系统将目标拆解为任务和子任务，由专门的子智能体分别处理网页研究、文档生成、数据处理和 API 调用。该产品面向 Perplexity Max 订阅用户（月费 200 美元），体现了 AI 模型日趋专业化而非趋同的趋势，赢家将是能够统一编排它们的平台。

title.en: We Deserve a Better Streams API for JavaScript
title.zh: JavaScript 值得拥有更好的 Streams API

summary.en: Cloudflare published a deep technical critique of the current Web Streams API, arguing that its complexity — locking model, promise overhead, BYOB reader friction — makes it impractical for many real-world use cases. The post proposes an alternative design based on async iterables with explicit backpressure policies (strict, block, drop-oldest, drop-newest), achieving 2x to 120x better performance by reducing promise allocation and eliminating intermediate buffering. Chained transform pipelines showed 80–90x improvements, and async iteration reached 40–100x gains in browsers.
summary.zh: Cloudflare 发表了一篇对现有 Web Streams API 的深度技术批评，指出其锁模型、Promise 开销和 BYOB Reader 复杂性使其在许多实际场景中不够实用。文章提出了基于异步可迭代对象的替代设计方案，采用显式背压策略（strict/block/drop-oldest/drop-newest），通过减少 Promise 分配和消除中间缓冲实现了 2 倍到 120 倍的性能提升。链式转换管道提升达 80–90 倍，浏览器中异步迭代提升达 40–100 倍。

title.en: Cloudflare Vinext: Run Next.js Apps on Vite, Deploy Anywhere
title.zh: Cloudflare Vinext：在 Vite 上运行 Next.js 应用，部署到任何平台

summary.en: Cloudflare released Vinext, an experimental Vite plugin that reimplements ~94% of the Next.js 16 API surface (Pages and App routers with full RSC support), targeting Cloudflare Workers as its deployment platform with integrated KV storage and D1 databases. The project gained nearly 5,000 GitHub stars and its codebase was predominantly written by Claude, making it a notable example of AI-generated open-source infrastructure. Vinext offers an alternative to the Next.js-Vercel coupling, though it currently ties deployment to Cloudflare rather than being platform-agnostic.
summary.zh: Cloudflare 发布了实验性 Vite 插件 Vinext，重新实现了约 94% 的 Next.js 16 API（Pages 和 App 路由及完整 RSC 支持），以 Cloudflare Workers 为部署目标，集成 KV 存储和 D1 数据库。项目获得近 5,000 个 GitHub Star，代码主要由 Claude 生成，是 AI 生成开源基础设施的典型案例。Vinext 提供了 Next.js-Vercel 耦合的替代方案，但目前将部署绑定到 Cloudflare 而非平台无关。

title.en: Making WebAssembly a First-Class Language on the Web
title.zh: 让 WebAssembly 成为 Web 上的一等语言

summary.en: Mozilla Hacks examines why WebAssembly remains a second-class citizen on the web despite its performance advantages, identifying barriers like cumbersome code loading, limited direct access to Web APIs, and poor integration with the browser's module system. The article proposes WebAssembly Components as the path forward, enabling Wasm modules to import and export Web API bindings natively. This vision would allow WebAssembly to stand alongside JavaScript as a first-class language for building web applications rather than being confined to compute-heavy library code.
summary.zh: Mozilla Hacks 探讨了尽管 WebAssembly 具有性能优势，但为何仍是 Web 上的二等公民，指出了代码加载繁琐、Web API 直接访问受限以及与浏览器模块系统集成不佳等障碍。文章提出 WebAssembly Components 作为前进方向，使 Wasm 模块能够原生导入和导出 Web API 绑定。这一愿景将使 WebAssembly 与 JavaScript 并列成为构建 Web 应用的一等语言，而不再局限于计算密集型库代码。

title.en: Bun v1.3.10: Native REPL, TC39 ES Decorators, and Browser Compilation Target
title.zh: Bun v1.3.10：原生 REPL、TC39 ES 装饰器及浏览器编译目标

summary.en: Bun v1.3.10 delivers 155 bug fixes alongside major new features: a native REPL for interactive development, TC39 standard ES decorators support, and a new --compile --target=browser flag that generates self-contained HTML files. Performance highlights include 25x faster structuredClone for arrays and Windows ARM64 support. The breadth of this release, from developer experience improvements to cross-platform expansion, reflects Bun's rapid evolution as a comprehensive JavaScript toolkit.
summary.zh: Bun v1.3.10 修复了 155 个 Bug，并带来多项重要新特性：用于交互式开发的原生 REPL、TC39 标准 ES 装饰器支持，以及可生成独立 HTML 文件的 --compile --target=browser 编译选项。性能方面亮点包括数组 structuredClone 速度提升 25 倍和 Windows ARM64 支持。从开发体验改善到跨平台扩展，这一版本的广度体现了 Bun 作为综合性 JavaScript 工具集的快速演进。

title.en: Deno 2.7: Temporal API Stabilized, Windows ARM, and npm Overrides
title.zh: Deno 2.7：Temporal API 正式稳定、Windows ARM 支持及 npm 覆盖

summary.en: Deno 2.7 stabilizes the Temporal API — the --unstable-temporal flag is no longer required — following Chrome 144's shipment of Temporal via V8 14.5 in January 2026. The release also introduces Windows on ARM builds, npm package.json overrides for dependency resolution, Brotli compression streams, and self-extracting binary support via deno compile --self-extracting. Node.js compatibility continues to improve with numerous enhancements, strengthening Deno's position as a drop-in alternative for existing Node.js projects.
summary.zh: Deno 2.7 正式稳定了 Temporal API——不再需要 --unstable-temporal 标志——紧随 Chrome 144 于 2026 年 1 月通过 V8 14.5 发布 Temporal 之后。此版本还引入了 Windows ARM 构建、npm package.json 覆盖机制、Brotli 压缩流以及通过 deno compile --self-extracting 实现的自解压二进制文件支持。Node.js 兼容性持续改进，进一步巩固了 Deno 作为现有 Node.js 项目替代方案的地位。

title.en: Firefox 148 Ships setHTML() and the Sanitizer API for Built-in XSS Protection
title.zh: Firefox 148 内置 setHTML() 和 Sanitizer API，提供原生 XSS 防护

summary.en: Firefox 148 becomes the first browser to ship the standardized Sanitizer API, introducing the setHTML() method that sanitizes untrusted HTML before inserting it into the DOM. The default configuration strips dangerous elements like malicious img tags and onclick handlers while preserving safe content, with support for custom sanitization configurations. Designed as a direct replacement for innerHTML in user-generated content scenarios and paired with Trusted Types, it makes secure HTML handling a browser-native default rather than an opt-in practice.
summary.zh: Firefox 148 成为首个发布标准化 Sanitizer API 的浏览器，引入 setHTML() 方法在将不受信任的 HTML 插入 DOM 前进行自动清理。默认配置会剥离恶意 img 标签和 onclick 处理器等危险元素，同时保留安全内容，并支持自定义清理配置。作为用户生成内容场景中 innerHTML 的直接替代方案，结合 Trusted Types，使安全的 HTML 处理成为浏览器原生默认行为而非可选实践。

title.en: Apple Open-Sources Foundation Models Python SDK
title.zh: Apple 开源 Foundation Models Python SDK

summary.en: Apple released official Python bindings for its Foundation Models framework, providing programmatic access to the on-device model at the core of Apple Intelligence. The SDK allows developers to integrate Apple's on-device AI capabilities directly into Python workflows, opening up new possibilities for building applications that leverage Apple's machine learning infrastructure. The project gained over 700 GitHub stars within its first week, signaling strong developer interest in Apple's AI ecosystem.
summary.zh: Apple 发布了 Foundation Models 框架的官方 Python 绑定，提供对 Apple Intelligence 核心端侧模型的编程访问。该 SDK 允许开发者将 Apple 的端侧 AI 能力直接集成到 Python 工作流中，为构建利用 Apple 机器学习基础设施的应用带来新的可能。项目首周即获得超过 700 个 GitHub Star，显示出开发者对 Apple AI 生态的浓厚兴趣。

title.en: Ladybird Browser Adopts Rust, Porting 25K Lines of C++ with AI Assistance
title.zh: Ladybird 浏览器采用 Rust，借助 AI 移植 2.5 万行 C++ 代码

summary.en: Ladybird browser's creator used Claude Code and Codex to port 25,000 lines of JavaScript engine code from C++ to Rust in just two weeks. The project demonstrates both the viability of Rust as a browser implementation language and the practical power of AI-assisted large-scale code migration. This marks a significant shift for the Ladybird project, which joins Firefox (via Servo components) in adopting Rust for performance-critical browser subsystems.
summary.zh: Ladybird 浏览器的创建者使用 Claude Code 和 Codex 在短短两周内将 25,000 行 JavaScript 引擎代码从 C++ 移植到了 Rust。该项目同时证明了 Rust 作为浏览器实现语言的可行性，以及 AI 辅助大规模代码迁移的实际能力。这标志着 Ladybird 项目的重大转向，继 Firefox（通过 Servo 组件）之后又一浏览器项目在性能关键子系统中采用 Rust。

title.en: Agentic Engineering Patterns: A Practical Guide for Working with Coding Agents
title.zh: 智能体工程模式：编码智能体实用指南

summary.en: Simon Willison launched an evolving collection of engineering patterns for working with AI coding agents, published as "guides" — a new content format designed to be updated over time. The initial release includes two chapters: one on how code generation costs have collapsed, and another on "Red/Green TDD" — a test-first workflow where developers write failing tests and let agents make them pass. Willison defines agentic engineering as professional software engineers using coding agents to amplify their existing expertise, positioning it as a complement to traditional engineering rather than a replacement.
summary.zh: Simon Willison 发布了一个持续更新的 AI 编码智能体工程模式合集，采用「指南」这一新内容形式，设计为随时间迭代而非一次性发布。首次发布包含两章：一章讨论代码生成成本的大幅降低，另一章介绍「红/绿 TDD」——开发者编写失败测试后让智能体使其通过的工作流。Willison 将智能体工程定义为专业软件工程师使用编码智能体放大现有专业能力，将其定位为传统工程的补充而非替代。
